description: Full OS authority ZIP export and ZIP recovery proof must prefer the governed Node ZIP profile (yauzl/yazl/crc-32) through BTS-wrapped executors. Python zipfile export is a compatibility fallback only and must be labeled as such.
enforcement_note: A user-facing full OS authority export after Stage6F should use export-zip-node-profile unless a receipt explains why the Node profile was unavailable or unsafe. Node modules remain outside the OS authority bundle.
